FAQ

$oHENLO is a $HENLO call option. 1 $oHENLO gives you a right to purchase 1 $HENLO at a 25% discount to its initial launch price. $HENLO DEX liquidity will be seeded at a price of $0.000012 ($6.9m FDV). $oHENLO can be exercised to redeem $HENLO for $0.000009 ($5.175m FDV) each
